(embedded source map)\n```\nThis is a standard pattern for module aggregation. The only unusual element is the embedded source map as a data URI, which is common in minified or transpiled files.\n\n---\n\n### **Report 1**\n- **Purpose:** Re-exports for an index module.\n- **Analysis:** No malicious code, backdoors, or suspicious behavior.
